headline: WELLTOWER INC (NYSE:WELL) Scores High on Growth Momentum and Technical Strength
summary: WELLTOWER INC earns high marks in a combined growth momentum and technical breakout screen, with accelerating earnings, rising sales, analyst upgrades, a perfect technical rating, and a clear consolidation breakout setup.
